nasb.text: Their offspring You will destroy from the earth, And their descendants from among the sons of men.

esv.text: You will destroy their descendants from the earth, and their offspring from among the children of man.

cnv.text: 你必從地上除滅他們的子孫， 從人間除滅他們的後裔。

ccb.text: 你必从世上铲除他们的子孙， 从人间灭绝他们的后裔。

csbs.text: 你从地上消灭他们的后代， 从世人中消灭他们的后裔。
